mapper.insert: INSERT INTO maturity_buy_reservations (user_id, linked_bank_account_id, maturity_date, stock_code, market, currency, buy_amount, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{linkedBankAccountId}, #{maturityDate}, #{stockCode}, #{market}, #{currency}, #{buyAmount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.user_id, m.linked_bank_account_id, m.maturity_date, m.stock_code, m.market, m.currency, m.buy_amount, m.status, m.order_id, m.fail_reason, m.executed_at, m.created_at, m.updated_at, s.stock_name FROM maturity_buy_reservations m LEFT JOIN tradable_stocks s ON s.stock_code = m.stock_code WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.id DESC

SELECT m.id, m.user_id, m.linked_bank_account_id, m.maturity_date, m.stock_code, m.market, m.currency, m.buy_amount, m.status, m.order_id, m.fail_reason, m.executed_at, m.created_at, m.updated_at, s.stock_name FROM maturity_buy_reservations m LEFT JOIN tradable_stocks s ON s.stock_code = m.stock_code WHERE m.id = #{id} AND m.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE maturity_buy_reservations SET status = 'RESERVED', maturity_date = #{maturityDate}, buy_amount = #{buyAmount}, order_id = NULL, fail_reason = NULL, executed_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('CANCELLED', 'FAILED')
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.user_id, m.linked_bank_account_id, m.maturity_date, m.stock_code, m.market, m.currency, m.buy_amount, m.status, m.order_id, m.fail_reason, m.executed_at, m.created_at, m.updated_at, s.stock_name FROM maturity_buy_reservations m LEFT JOIN tradable_stocks s ON s.stock_code = m.stock_code WHERE m.status = 'RESERVED' AND m.maturity_date <= #{today} ORDER BY m.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE maturity_buy_reservations SET status = 'CANCELLED' WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'RESERVED'
UPDATE maturity_buy_reservations SET status = #{status}, order_id = #{orderId}, fail_reason = #{failReason}, executed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'RESERVED'
